notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes an ongoing battlefield conflict (五界大阵 vs 九九连环不绝阵) with mostly public/visible events -陈衣 analyzing the array, ordering撤阵, etc. No private knowledge, secret plans, or future-known information is directly supported by the source pointers. Events like 方源 regretting not incorporating阵灵阵旗 are internal thoughts but not directly quoted from source. The source pointers only show surface-level actions and dialogue. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted with sufficient source backing without speculation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
陈衣观察到五界大阵的五色烟瘴渗透九九连环不绝阵导致中洲蛊仙反噬，下令撤子阵转为被动防守，直接源支持。
observedMotive: 下令撤子阵转为被动防守 (陈衣毅然下令撤子阵)
